region_description: 3rd largest US state by land mass, largest by population. World's 4th largest economy. Biodiversity hotspot.
category_description: Access to adequate nutritious food for all Californians.
indicator_description: % of households who live with food insecurity
justice_spotlight: Rural and low-income communities face highest food insecurity rates.
actions: Support local food banks|Advocate for CalFresh enrollment expansion|Buy from local farmers markets|Support community garden programs

indicator_description: % of adults who eat < 1 serving of vegetables per day
source: CDC Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System

category_description: Healthy lives and access to quality healthcare.
indicator_description: % of population living in counties with life expectancy below OECD average (80.3 years)
justice_spotlight: Low-income communities and communities of color face shorter life expectancy and less healthcare access.
actions: Support community health centers|Advocate for Medi-Cal expansion|Help neighbors enroll in Covered California

indicator_description: % of adults who delayed or skipped health care due to costs

category_description: Quality education and lifelong learning opportunities.
indicator_description: % of people aged 16-74 with literacy proficiency at or below Level 1
actions: Volunteer as a tutor or mentor|Support adult literacy programs|Advocate for equitable school funding|Support community college access

indicator_description: % of college graduates with student debt

category_description: Decent livelihoods and meaningful work for all.
indicator_description: % of people experiencing poverty (Supplemental Poverty Measure)
actions: Support living wage campaigns|Buy from worker-owned cooperatives|Support workforce development programs

indicator_description: % unemployed including part-time and marginally attached (U-6)

category_description: Safe communities with accountable justice systems.
indicator_description: % of people exposed to violent crime per 100K
actions: Support community-based violence prevention|Advocate for restorative justice|Support re-entry programs for formerly incarcerated

indicator_description: % of people in counties with inadequate approach to law enforcement

category_description: Democratic participation and civic engagement.
indicator_description: % of eligible voters who did not vote in the 2020 presidential election
actions: Register to vote and encourage others|Attend city council meetings|Support voter registration drives in underrepresented communities

indicator_description: % of eligible voters not registered to vote

category_description: Community bonds trust and sense of belonging.
indicator_description: % of people living in counties with a Gini Index > 0.30
actions: Support community land trusts|Volunteer with local mutual aid organizations|Advocate for progressive tax policies

indicator_description: % of people who report they are not too happy

category_description: Gender racial and economic equity across communities.
indicator_description: % difference of men's median wage earned by women for full-time work
actions: Support pay transparency policies|Advocate for equal pay legislation|Support women and BIPOC-owned businesses

indicator_description: Inclusion score based on racial gaps in economic vitality readiness and connectedness

category_description: Adequate affordable housing for all.
indicator_description: Point-in-time count of unhoused people
actions: Support local homeless services organizations|Advocate for affordable housing development|Support tenant protection policies|Push for ADU incentives

indicator_description: % of renters with housing costs >30% of household income

category_description: Digital access and sustainable transportation for all.
indicator_description: % of households without broadband internet subscription
actions: Support digital equity programs|Advocate for municipal broadband|Donate devices to community technology programs|Use public transit

indicator_description: Report card score for VMT and transit access (combined 6/10)

category_description: Clean affordable reliable energy access.
indicator_description: % of households whose energy bill is >10% of household income
source: US Dept of Energy LEAD Tool
actions: Switch to community choice energy 100% renewable option|Apply for CARE/FERA low-income rate discounts|Install solar panels|Weatherize your home

indicator_description: % of population in counties with average total outage >6 hours per year

category_description: Clean water and sanitation services for all.
indicator_description: % of people who receive water from systems that do not meet quality standards
source: CA State Water Resources Control Board
actions: Conserve water|Support watershed protection programs|Check your annual water quality report|Properly dispose of household chemicals

indicator_description: % of people receiving water from non-compliant sanitation systems
source: CA State Water Resources Control Board

category_description: Human activity releases greenhouse gases mainly by burning fossil fuels.
indicator_description: Carbon footprint per capita (consumption-based)
actions: Reduce driving — use transit bike or walk|Switch to an electric vehicle|Electrify home heating and cooking|Support climate action legislation

indicator_description: % of electricity not from renewables (solar wind geothermal)

category_description: CO2 absorption lowers ocean pH threatening marine life.
indicator_description: Change in pH compared to preindustrial levels
actions: Reduce personal carbon footprint|Support marine sanctuary programs|Participate in coastal cleanup events

indicator_description: Acidification potential: SO2-Eq footprint per capita

category_description: Toxic chemicals contaminate air water and soil.
indicator_description: % of high-risk toxics out of total pesticides applied per year
actions: Buy organic produce|Support farmworker health organizations|Advocate for reduced pesticide use

indicator_description: % of high-risk chemicals released out of total toxic chemicals produced per year

category_description: Poor air quality from transportation industry and wildfires.
indicator_description: % of air basins in violation of national ozone standard of 0.070 ppm
actions: Reduce driving|Support wildfire prevention|Avoid wood burning on spare-the-air days|Check AQI before outdoor exercise

indicator_description: % of air basins with PM2.5 levels classified as critically overloaded

category_description: Excessive water extraction threatens ecosystems and long-term water security.
indicator_description: % of groundwater basins pumped from aquifers rated as critically overdrafted
actions: Conserve water|Install water-efficient fixtures|Support groundwater recharge projects|Support recycled water infrastructure

indicator_description: Blue water footprint per capita (consumption-based)

category_description: Conversion of natural land reduces ecological resilience.
indicator_description: % of land without forest cover compared to 75% of preindustrial level
actions: Support land conservation organizations|Advocate for infill development over greenfield|Support reforestation programs

indicator_description: Ecological footprint per capita (consumption-based)

category_description: Species decline and habitat destruction threaten ecosystem stability.
indicator_description: % of native species at risk of extinction
actions: Volunteer for habitat restoration|Report invasive species|Support wildlife corridors|Support conservation funding

indicator_description: % of unprotected land/sea area

category_description: Depletion of stratospheric ozone increases UV radiation exposure.
indicator_description: Compliant with Montreal Protocol
actions: Properly dispose of old refrigerators and AC units|Use climate-friendly refrigerants

indicator_description: Beyond global average minimum thickness threshold

category_description: Excess nitrogen and phosphorus from agriculture and industry pollute waterways.
indicator_description: Footprint per capita for eutrophication
actions: Support sustainable agriculture practices|Reduce fertilizer use|Support watershed protection programs

indicator_description: Nitrogen leached to groundwater per year
